# this is the build file for project 
# it is autogenerated by the xmake build system.
# do not edit by hand.

# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.28.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(inputtino-server LANGUAGES CXX)
set(CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES ON)

# target
add_executable(inputtino-server "")
set_target_properties(inputtino-server PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "inputtino-server")
set_target_properties(inputtino-server PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/debug")
target_include_directories(inputtino-server SYSTEM PRIVATE
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/l/libhv/1.3.2/5864640e55de4fbb9715f0c6870455af/include
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/j/jwt-cpp/v0.7.0/1a6f9da8b62143e0815b92e308aa7362/include
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/o/openssl/1.1.1-w/61d86fc2f8cc4e60a5bef5bc478c3a92/include
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/n/nlohmann_json/v3.11.3/c9df459395cd4a608253b3c8332184dd/include
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/j/jsoncons/v0.170.2/7f53506c224e49c9b85070270867ebfa/include
)
target_compile_definitions(inputtino-server PRIVATE
    HV_STATICLIB
    JWT_DISABLE_PICOJSON
)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE /EHsc)
elseif(Clang)
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE -fexceptions)
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
elseif(Gcc)
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE -fexceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(inputtino-server PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(inputtino-server PRIVATE cxx_std_23)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(inputtino-server PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET inputtino-server PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(inputtino-server PRIVATE
    hv_static
    libssl
    libcrypto
    crypt32
    advapi32
    ws2_32
    user32
)
target_link_directories(inputtino-server PRIVATE
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/l/libhv/1.3.2/5864640e55de4fbb9715f0c6870455af/lib
    C:/Users/Kristian/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/o/openssl/1.1.1-w/61d86fc2f8cc4e60a5bef5bc478c3a92/lib
)
target_sources(inputtino-server PRIVATE
    Source/main.cpp
    Source/server.cppm
    Source/utils.cppm
)
